title: Amtech Plastic Paint Kettle with Magnet Brush Holder, Home DIY, Durable, Easy to Use, Holds Paint Brushes up to 4” Wide for Mess-Free Painting, Hooks onto Ladders (1 Litre)
features: PAINTING MUST-HAVE: With a 1 litre (1.8 pint) capacity, this paint kettle is ideal for most household paints and will help you with any painting task, whether you’re a professional decorator or just beginning your home DIY journey.
DURABLE: Made from a moulded polypropylene construction for long lasting use you can rely on and work with confidently.

EASY TO USE: A strong magnet holds paint brushes up to 4” wide so you won’t have to awkwardly balance your brush when you take a tea break, while the handle is easy to hold in one hand and hooks onto most ladders for mess-free painting!
3 YEAR WARRANTY: We work hard to make sure our tools are reliable for any task. That's why all our hand tools are backed by a three year product replacement warranty.
DIY KNOW HOW: At Amtech, we want to improve every home and life by making DIY a doddle for every generation and skill level with tools and expertise that you can rely on.
description: Product Description The paint kettle holds up to 1 litre (1.8 pints), and is ideal for most household paints. The magnet holds brushes up to 4” for added convenience, while the handle is easy to hold and hooks onto most ladders for hassle-free painting. Made from moulded polypropylene, the paint kettle is highly durable, impact-resistant, and withstands heavy loads, ensuring a reliable accessory for your DIY projects. Enjoy stress-free cleaning when you’ve finished painting and decorating. Simply line the inside with cling film before you pour the paint - when you’re done, pour out any excess paint and remove the cling film.
